title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Maruti Suzuki India Capital India:
Maruti Suzuki India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India!
